task: Check permit availability for a group of 4 in Brooks Camp, Katmai National Park for next Saturday.
graderReasoning: The agent reached the correct Recreation.gov permit page for 'Brooks Camp Camping Permit' at Katmai National Park & Preserve, opened the detailed availability view, set the group size to 4, and the page then displayed the availability grid. In that grid, 'Brooks Camp on May 16, 2026 - Available' was visible with '56' remaining, and the page showed '4 Group Members (6 max)'. This directly answers permit availability for a group of 4 next Saturday. The agent did not book, but the task only asked to check availability.
final_result_response:
Yes, Brooks Camp Camping Permit availability is open for a group of 4 next Saturday, May 16, 2026.

Recreation.gov shows Brooks Camp on May 16, 2026 as “Available” with 56 spots remaining. Group size 4 is within the max group size of 6.

I did not make a reservation.
action_history: Opening Recreation.gov: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.recreation.gov/');
Searching for Brooks Camp permit: await page.locator('e6').fill('Brooks Camp Katmai permit');
Searching for Brooks Camp permit: await page.locator('e6').press('Enter');
Searching from main search box: await page.locator('e20').fill('Brooks Camp Katmai');
Searching from main search box: await page.locator('e21').click();
Opening Brooks Camp permit page: await page.locator('e27').click();
Setting group size to 4: await page.locator('e132').fill('4');
Closing group selector and checking controls: await page.locator('e134').click();
